name: Marine Bank & Trust Company
description_short: Marine Bank & Trust Company is a federally insured credit union (NCUA) offering digital banking, mobile check deposit, home loans, and branch-based personal service across Florida locations.
description_long:
Marine Bank & Trust Company operates as a federally insured credit union with physical branches in Vero Beach, Sebastian, and Melbourne, Florida. The institution emphasizes a hybrid model combining traditional personalized service with modern digital capabilities. Founded to serve the local community, Marine has recently undergone significant ownership changes, with press releases indicating acquisition activity through 2026.

Marine offers comprehensive banking services including checking and savings accounts, home mortgage loans, mobile and online banking platforms, bill pay, direct deposit setup, and digital wallet integration via Visa. Their mobile banking app features mobile check deposit with next-business-day fund availability, account transfers, bill payment, balance inquiries, and biometric security (fingerprint/face recognition). Members can also toggle card access on/off remotely. The institution provides customer access without appointment requirements during business hours, with phone and email support.

Marine distinguishes itself through emphasis on local branch accessibility combined with modern digital solutions, positioning itself as combining "local lenders + online convenience." They maintain active member communication through educational content (blogs/videos on fraud prevention, credit topics, home buying tips) and operate a Fraud Resource Center. The organization explicitly warns members it will never request login credentials or account information, addressing common phishing concerns.

A critical caveat is Marine's recent acquisition activity: press releases from March 2026 indicate ELGA Credit Union completed acquisition of Marine Bank, meaning this profile documents an entity that no longer operates independently. Prospective members should verify current operational status and whether service continuity is maintained under new ownership. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online banking platform with login access
Mobile banking app with biometric authentication
Mobile check deposit (available before 7 pm for next-day clearing)
Home mortgage loans with streamlined application
Fraud Resource Center and educational content
pros: NCUA federal insurance protection for deposits
Mobile check deposit with next-business-day fund availability
Biometric security options (fingerprint/face recognition) for mobile app
Remote card lock feature to disable lost/stolen cards instantly
No-appointment branch access during business hours with personalized service
Integrated Visa digital wallet for contactless payments
Comprehensive fraud education resources and scam alerts
cons: Company appears to have been acquired as of March 2026 according to press releases, raising questions about service continuity
Limited geographic footprint (only 3 Florida locations mentioned)
Website lacks specific information on fees, interest rates, or account minimums
Mobile app fund availability limited to deposits before 7 pm for next-business-day access
No mention of alternative funding options like personal loans or lines of credit beyond mortgages
best_for: Florida residents in Vero Beach, Sebastian, or Melbourne seeking relationship-based banking with digital convenience
Home buyers seeking local mortgage expertise with simplified application process
Mobile-first users who value biometric security and remote card management
diagnosis: Marine Bank & Trust is best for Florida residents wanting personalized, appointment-free branch service combined with modern mobile banking—but potential customers should verify current operational status given the March 2026 acquisition by ELGA Credit Union. The company's main strength is hybrid service delivery; the primary caveat is ongoing ownership transition.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
